use_cases: Navigation menus that expand on click with smooth animated transitions
Action menus or context dropdowns with click-outside-to-close behavior
Select-style interfaces for filtering or option selection in dashboards
Compact dropdown buttons for toolbars and header navigation elements
ai_summary: An animated dropdown component with smooth Framer Motion transitions and click-outside detection. Features customizable button variants (outline, ghost, link, primary) and integrates ChevronDown icon with rotation animation on open. Supports standard Tailwind styling patterns and is designed as a reusable navigation element for SaaS applications.
